problem id: 8647cfb4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  01011000 -> 11000011
  00000110 -> 00110000
  10111110 -> 11110111
  01001101 -> 01101011
  10110001 -> 10001111
  11100010 -> 00010111
  01001100 -> 01100011
  01010111 -> 10111011

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 00101011
